summary: Comprehensive backend (26/26 pytest passed) and frontend smoke-flow tests for Hotel Swastik booking app. All requested features verified end-to-end: auth, rooms, bookings CRUD, search, by-aadhar history, checkout, WebSocket auth + booking_created broadcast, and UI flows (login→dashboard→new booking modal→bookings tabs→search→settings).

minor.issue: When token is provided but invalid, the ingress/edge layer rejects with HTTP 403 before FastAPI can send close code 4401. Missing-token path returns 4401 from FastAPI directly. Functionally correct (rejection enforced), but the close-code contract differs by path. Not blocking.

issues: Console deprecation warnings from react-native-web: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Low priority - cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with boxShadow and 'props.pointerEvents' with style.pointerEvents to silence RN Web warnings.

(Optional) Investigate why ingress layer rejects WS with invalid token at HTTP 403 before reaching FastAPI's 4401 close handler — likely due to the long token query param being parsed by edge proxy. Functionally fine.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 515-line module which is acceptable but approaching the 700-line threshold; if more endpoints are added consider splitting (auth, rooms, bookings, ws) into routers.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False is fine for token-in-header auth (current setup).
All Mongo responses correctly exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} and explicit _booking_public sanitizer.
JWT secret is loaded from env, bcrypt hash format ($2b$) used, seed_admin is idempotent and updates password if env value changes — good.
seed_data_creation: Tests created bookings on rooms 101, 102, 103, 105 prefixed with TEST_; all checked out / cleaned up at session end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests live at /app/backend/tests/. Run with: cd /app/backend/tests && pytest -v. Frontend public URL: https://swastik-stay.preview.emergentagent.com (env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Admin creds: admin@swastik.com / admin123.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Build is functional and meets all 19 acceptance criteria listed in the review request.
